content.text: Run 'ls -la' and summarize what you see.

args.description: List all files in workspace with details

shellToolCall.description: List all files in workspace with details

content.text:
Here is what that listing shows.

**Location:** `/private/tmp/cursed-scratch`

| Entry | What it is |
|--------|------------|
| **`.`** | The workspace directory; owned by your user, group `wheel`, mode `rwxr-xr-x` (755). It has the `@` flag (commonly from extended attributes on macOS). |
| **`..`** | Parent is `/private/tmp` (`/tmp`); world-writable temp root (`rwxrwxrwt` sticky bit, owned by `root`). |
| **`.git/`** | A Git repository directory (metadata only so far: status showed no commits on `main`). |
| **`sample.txt`** | A regular file, 29 bytes, owned by you, `rw-r--r--` (644), also with `@`. |

**Summary:** The folder is a **fresh Git repo** with **no other tracked content yet** besides standard Git internals—only **`sample.txt`** sits beside `.git`. Total directory metadata size reported is 8 (typical for a small folder on this filesystem).
